facebook.caption: Tucked along 600 Đường Cách Mạng Tháng Tám in Khu 6, Ola Coffee is one of those finds that makes a trip feel a little more personal. With a solid 4.5/5 from 145 reviewers, it has clearly won over plenty of visitors looking for a genuine coffee stop away from the tourist trail. Swing by in the morning for a quieter, more local atmosphere, and grab a table before the midday heat sets in.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the cups land on the table at Ola Coffee and you will understand why the rating speaks for itself. Real coffee, a relaxed vibe, and a neighborhood corner of Phu Quoc that most visitors scroll right past. This is your sign to stop scrolling and stop in.

instagram.caption: Ola Coffee earns its 4.5/5 the honest way. Good coffee, a low-key neighborhood feel, and a welcome break from the beach crowds. Located in Khu 6 on Đường Cách Mạng Tháng Tám. Go early, go often.
instagram.video_caption: Morning light, a proper cup, and zero tourist rush. Ola Coffee in Khu 6 is the kind of Phu Quoc moment you will actually want to remember.

tiktok.caption: Skipped the resort coffee and found Ola Coffee in Khu 6 instead. 4.5 stars, real vibes, zero regrets. #OlaCoffee #PhuQuoc #VietnamCoffee #CafeHop

video_script.hook: Best coffee stop in Phu Quoc?
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip
